ItacAcademyItem.Name: Confusi-Ferrara (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Maylender, vol. 2, ad vocem (who quotes Baruffaldi, Notizie istoriche..., p. 32), one publication, related to the history of this Academy, but not in British Library collections is: Berni, Francesco, L` omicidio amoroso di Radamisto discorso accademico di Francesco Berni tratto da un testo nel dodicesimo de gli annali di Tacito (In Ferrara: per Francesco Suzzi stamp. cam., 1640), which was dedicated to Alessandro Canani, and apparently was read in the Confusi Academy, in the presence of Cardinal Rocci, Papal Legate in Ferrara.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
